message:
🌱 Add dify: Pass input parameters to iframe mission (#858)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dify-5575-pass-input-parameters-to-iframe",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dify: Pass input parameters to iframe",
+    "description": "Pass input parameters to iframe. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dify setup",
+        "description": "Verify your dify deployment is running:\n```bash\ndocker compose ps\n```\nThis feature requires a working dify installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the feature request",
+        "description": "Users requested the ability to pass input parameters to the dify chatbot when embedded via iframe, enabling dynamic configuration of the chatbot from the parent page."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the iframe input parameters feature",
+        "description": "The fix adds support for the `inputs` key in `difyChatbotConfig`, allowing input parameters to be passed to the embedded chatbot iframe. This enables parent pages to pre-populate chatbot inputs dynamically.\n\nUpgrade to the dify version that includes this feature."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm that input parameters passed via `difyChatbotConfig.inputs` are correctly received by the embedded chatbot."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added support for the `inputs` key in `difyChatbotConfig` to allow passing input parameters to the dify chatbot when embedded via iframe, enabling dynamic configuration from the parent page.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "dify",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "dify"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify/issues/5575",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify/pull/6376"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 4,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "docker-compose"
+    ],
+    "description": "Docker and Docker Compose for running dify. Alternatively, a Kubernetes cluster for K8s-based deployment."
+  },
